item.title: Leaving the US.
item.description: We started this process 4 years ago through doing research and saving money. We hired an attorney 18 months back to help us with all paperwork and government forms. They also helped with arranging all the consulate appointments in person. Yes we could have done it without an attorney but frankly, we didn't want to. Now everything is finally coming together. Pet passports are in. Queen Mary II tickets are bought. Shipping containers will arrive in 2 months. House has a buyer. Visas just approved. Business loan closed on a new venture we are taking over. New home in under contract. We are doing this. 5 years from now we will be eligible to apply for citizenship. We didn't want to tell anyone in case things didn't work out. I didn't want to be like all those other people who simply talked about leaving. But now it's not all talk. We are doing it. We are leaving. And 3 days before my 30th, we will be in Scotland. Good luck to all my fellow Americans. I hope for the best back home but this is not a country I want to spend the rest of my life in anymore. And I need to get my girl out of it before we go full hand maids tale.
item.dc:creator: DirtyDusty

item.title: Last year I posted this and pissed a lot of people off. Well here you go again. Even angrier than before.

item.title: Amazing isn't quite the word!
item.description: 17 year-old Mondo Duplantis has broken the world record outdoor pole vault in Stockholm with 6.16m. The slow motion of his record attempt is extraordinary.

item.title: Bottom Shelf Satisfaction
item.description:
This one just makes me feel fucking sticky..
Well, I hope you're satisfied, I know I never am. Here's Magoo suddenly remembering the lamp she forgot to knock over.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: We should ban poison
item.description: So...full story. She was forced by her parents to marry someone she didn't want to marry. Her boyfriend helped her poison a drink for her husband. Her husband didn't drink it. She put the poisoned drink in the fridge. Her mother-in-law used the poisoned drink to make a dessert, and served it at a party. Since she and her boyfriend made the poison, they were arrested. She was tried and given 15 life sentences concurrently, and has to pay a 3 million rupee fine. Provided she survives prison, she'll be released in 2033 2043.
item.dc:creator: deevilknievel

item.description: FP edit: whoop! Do people still ask for things? Send me your favourites: recipes, memes, boobs, pets, space pics, whatever you fancy! Or just be kind, especially to those who don't share your viewpoint.

item.title: Final day of comiccon (Denver fan expo)
item.description:
Surf troopers
Kid chose the Naruto run pose ?
The hair lights up
Seeing Double
Neverending story
Our Lorde And Saviour Cthulu
One of two mononokes
Mysterio
This sheild agent dude
The other mononoke
Hawks
That one horror game you know the one. There was a girl of him last time
One punch man
Chainsaw head
Hops and fox
Spidergwen wanted to pose with my parasol (:
Teachers of of Hogwarts (never seen the movies or read the books so...)
My favorite couples costume, Michaelangelo and a pizza slice
Just wow
Loved the hat
Green witches are best witches
Best parenting!
Journey
She was so happy to be recognized
Hooves
Teen titans! (Minus cyborg)
Bustin make ya feel good
I was a kitsune this time.
item.dc:creator: AprilSpectrum
